revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:旧暦07月]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

{| align=right id=toc style="width:140px" |- style="background:#ccffff" |colspan="6" align="center" bgcolor="#ccccff"|'''[[7月 (旧暦)|旧暦7月]]（文月）''' |- style="text-align:center;" style="font-size:70%" |先勝 |友引 |先負 |仏滅 |大安 |赤口 |- style="background:#ccccff; text-align:center;" style="font-size:70%" |[[7月1日 (旧暦)|1]] |[[7月2日 (旧暦)|2]] |[[7月3日 (旧暦)|3]] |[[7月4日 (旧暦)|4]] |[[7月5日 (旧暦)|5]] |[[7月6日 (旧暦)|6]] |- style="text-align:center;" style="font-size:70%" |[[7月7日 (旧暦)|7]] |[[7月8日 (旧暦)|8]] |[[7月9日 (旧暦)|9]] |[[7月10日 (旧暦)|10]] |[[7月11日 (旧暦)|11]] |[[7月12日 (旧暦)|12]] |- style="background:#ccccff; text-align:center;" style="font-size:70%" |[[7月13日 (旧暦)|13]] |[[7月14日 (旧暦)|14]] |[[7月15日 (旧暦)|15]] |[[7月16日 (旧暦)|16]] |[[7月17日 (旧暦)|17]] |[[7月18日 (旧暦)|18]] |- style="text-align:center;" style="font-size:70%" |[[7月19日 (旧暦)|19]] |[[7月20日 (旧暦)|20]] |[[7月21日 (旧暦)|21]] |[[7月22日 (旧暦)|22]] |[[7月23日 (旧暦)|23]] |[[7月24日 (旧暦)|24]] |- style="background:#ccccff; text-align:center;" style="font-size:70%" |[[7月25日 (旧暦)|25]] |[[7月26日 (旧暦)|26]] |[[7月27日 (旧暦)|27]] |[[7月28日 (旧暦)|28]] |[[7月29日 (旧暦)|29]] |[[7月30日 (旧暦)|30]] |}

revision.comment: 六曜を最下段に移動; 理由は[[Template‐ノート:旧暦1月]]に記載

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Template:旧暦0July]] to [[Template:Old Lunar Calendar0July]]: Text replacement - "旧暦" to "Old Lunar Calendar"

revision.text:

revision.comment: I think this fixes the linkingf
revision.text:

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Old Lunar Calendar July]] to [[Template:Lunar July]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar " to "Lunar "
Text replacement - "旧暦7月" to "Lunar July"
Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
Text replacement - "Lunar July" to "Lunisolar July"

Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)

Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)
Copying from [[Category:Original templates]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Text replacement - "[[Category:Original templates]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Original templates]]</noinclude>"
Copying from [[Category:Original templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Bump February 13, 2025 bump]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:暦表テンプレート]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵↵↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
doing this because it is quite important for standardization in my corrections system
Text replacement - "[[Category:qq]]" to ""
Text replacement - "↵|qq=}}" to " }}"
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Bot: undo last edit ([[Special:Diff/3061467]])
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Copying from [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] to [[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Copying from [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[ja:Template:旧暦{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
doing the translation subst
5 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:Template:旧暦7月 up to rev 53020488
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:旧暦7月]] to [[Template:Lunisolar July]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
Bot: restore translated version
Moving the </noinclude> to the bottom so it is not transcluded
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: add category Category:Calendar templates
Bot: append Wikidata-derived interwikis
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove deleted category Jawiki date templates
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Bot: remove deleted category Qq
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q25920361)
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24271391609|time triggered pipeline]]

Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 5 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
